variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11939 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11939 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11939 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P528708 Breather, Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11939
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P528708 Breather, Air is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 9004 Ventilator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11939
variants.description: For over 70 years, MANN-FILTER has been synonymous with premium filters in original equipment quality worldwide. Benefit from a comprehensive product range and optimum filtration performance to protect drivers, engines and machinery. In the familiar yellow-green packaging, MANN-FILTER offers innovative solutions to new filtration challenges and produces on a global scale in accordance with the latest international production and test standards in the automotive industry.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4895 Air Filter Breather | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11939
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF4895 premium air breather is designed to filter out contaminants before they reach your engine.
